story.asA: desktop application user (IT leader presenting to executives)
story.iWant: to export activity charts to CSV
story.soThat: I can analyze data in Excel, share reports with stakeholders, and present ROI metrics in professional formats.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Export dropdown in Activity chart toolbar with "Export as CSV", "Export as JSON", and "Export as PDF" options
CSV export includes header row and data rows (Date, Prompts, Tokens)
JSON export is valid JSON with pretty-print indentation
PDF export includes: formatted header, embedded chart images (both prompts and tokens charts), summary table, metadata footer
PDF chart images captured via Chart.js `.toBase64Image()` method
PDF generated using jsPDF library (A4 portrait format)
Export metadata included in all formats: export timestamp, date range, granularity
Native save dialog allows user to choose save location and filename
Exported CSV opens correctly in Excel/Google Sheets
Exported PDF displays correctly in PDF viewers (Adobe Reader, Preview, Chrome)
Success toast shows after export completes with file path

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: Export dropdown in Activity chart toolbar with "Export as CSV", "Export as JSON"...
Test: CSV export includes header row and data rows (Date, Prompts, Tokens)...
Test: JSON export is valid JSON with pretty-print indentation...
Test: PDF export includes: formatted header, embedded chart images (both prompts and t...
Test: PDF chart images captured via Chart.js `.toBase64Image()` method...
